app.title: Gifted Grads Events
register.title: Register for the event
register.subtitle: Complete your information to secure your spot at the event and take part in amazing experiences.
register.giveaway.lead: When you register you get a
register.giveaway.highlight: unique number for the iPad giveaway.
register.feature.instant.title: Instant confirmation
register.feature.instant.body: You'll receive your confirmation immediately in your email.
register.feature.secure.title: Secure registration
register.feature.secure.body: We protect your information with the highest security standards.
register.feature.team.title: Information to the team
register.feature.team.body: Your registration is sent directly to the organizing team.
register.error.generic: Could not complete registration. Try again.
confirmation.title: Registration complete!
confirmation.subtitle: Thanks for signing up for the event.
confirmation.subtitle.line1: Thank you for registering for Gifted Grads Events.
confirmation.subtitle.line2: Your information has been received successfully.
confirmation.numberNotice: Save it — you'll need it for the raffle.
confirmation.notice: Save this number — you'll need it for the iPad raffle.
confirmation.email.title: Check your email
confirmation.email.body: We've sent you an email with your registration confirmation and next steps.
confirmation.email.spam: If you can't find it, check your spam or promotions folder.
confirmation.notice1.title: Your registration was sent to the organizing team
confirmation.notice1.body: Our team will review your information and contact you if necessary.
confirmation.notice2.title: You are already entered in the giveaway
confirmation.notice2.body: You're automatically entered to win an iPad at the end of the event.
confirmation.notice3.title: Confirmation sent by email
confirmation.notice3.body: We've sent the registration details to your email address.
confirmation.timeout.title: We're processing your registration
confirmation.timeout.body: This can take a few minutes. Check your email or reload this page in a moment.
login.title: Manager sign in
login.subtitle: Enter the password to access the dashboard.
dashboard.title: Welcome, Manager
dashboard.subtitle: Real-time summary of your event.
dashboard.search.placeholder: Search by name, email or number...
detail.title: Attendee detail
raffle.winner.title: 🎉 We have a winner!
raffle.winner.name: Name
raffle.winner.emailSent: Notification email sent to the winner
raffle.winner.emailFailed: Could not send the email to the winner
raffle.error.notFound: That number does not match any participant.
